title: Selective Voice Chat | A Simple Voice Chat Addone
description: Choose who can hear and speak. Create your own powerful game with this addon
body:
🎙️ **Selective Voice Chat** | A Simple Voice Chat Add-On

✨ **Key Features**
- Global Mute: Silence the entire server instantly with a single command, creating a focused environment. 
- Seamless Integration: Works harmoniously with Minecraft's vanilla mechanics like tags and teams, enabling incredibly dynamic and complex setups. 

🛠 **Command Guide**
`/allowvoiceonly [targets]`
[targets] (optional): Specify one or more player targets, Minecraft selectors (e.g. `@a`, `@p`), or tags.

**How it works:**
When you specify a target (`/allowvoiceonly @p[tag=mafia]`), only that player or group will be able to hear and speak in voice chat. All others are automatically muted. 

🎮 **Practical Use Cases & Examples**

This add-on shines when combined with Minecraft commands.
**The Mafia Game**: The host gives themselves and mafia members the ability to communicate secretly.

/tag @a[tag=mafia] add can_talk
/tag @p add can_talk (add yourself)
/allowvoiceonly @a[can_talk]

- When the round ends, just reset it to allow everyone to talk again.
/allowvoiceonly (mute everyone)
... or /allowvoiceonly @a (unmute everyone)

_This project is still in development and we'd love to hear your suggestions and ideas. If you have any feature requests, found a bug, or want to share your experience with it, please let us know. discord faworitewine_
